# Relic Density                                #

Omega h^2                     = 1.05e+01
Omegah_Planck                 = 1.20e-01
xsi                           = 1.00e+00 	 # xsi = (Omega/Omega_Planck)
x_f                           = 1.60e+01
sigmav_xf                     = 1.33e-28 	 # cm^3 s^-1
# % of the relic density channels
%_chichibar_bbx               = 80.00 %
